_labels_note: Calc-only labels (monthly/downPayment/term/mileage/residual) mirror the Audi config — the VW CCF form (formsccf.volkswagen.be) is the SAME D'Ieteren milesFinance widget as Audi's, so the vocabulary (Maandbedrag, /maand, eerste verhoogde huur, aankoopoptie) is identical. They are only consulted when the page renders a real calculation (data-has-calculation-information=True); that block is reCAPTCHA-gated for automation, so the real figures normally come from the captured FinanceApi/Calculate JSON. Vehicle price + model are parsed structurally.
